goalsManagement.title: Goals Management
goalsManagement.subtitle: Track your progress and history.
goalsManagement.createGoalDesc: Set new nutrition targets and macros
goalsManagement.createCheckinDesc: Add a new nutrition check-in entry
goalsManagement.emptyStateMessage: Create a new goal to get started
goalsManagement.deleteGoalMessage: This goal will be permanently removed from your history.

manageGoalData.deleteGoalWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This action cannot be undone.
manageGoalData.title: Nutrition goals
manageGoalData.noGoalsDesc: Set nutrition goals to see them here
manageGoalData.duplicateGoalDesc: Create a copy to use as a new goal
manageGoalData.regenerateCheckinsDesc: Delete and recreate check-ins for this goal

goalCreationMethod.title: New Goal
goalCreationMethod.subtitle: How would you like to set up your new goal?
goalCreationMethod.guidedDescription: We'll guide you step-by-step to the right calorie and macro targets.
goalCreationMethod.manualDescription: Enter your calories, macros, and targets directly.
goalCreationMethod.autoCalculateDescription: We calculate your targets using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula based on your profile.

goalType.title: What's your main goal?
goalType.subtitle: This helps us recommend the right calorie and macro targets for you.
goalType.loseDescription: Reduce body fat through a calorie deficit.
goalType.maintainDescription: Keep your current weight and body composition.
goalType.gainDescription: Build muscle and strength with a calorie surplus.

goalWeight.subtitle: Set the weight you want to reach. Your current weight is shown for reference.
goalWeight.label: Goal Weight
goalWeight.tipLoseBF: Aiming for 0.5–1% of your body weight per week is a sustainable rate that helps preserve muscle mass during a cut.
goalWeight.tipGain: Gaining 0.25–0.5 kg per week keeps fat gain minimal while still allowing steady muscle growth.

targetDate.title: When do you want to reach your goal?
targetDate.subtitle: Setting a deadline helps you track your progress over time.
targetDate.label: Target Date

manageCheckinData.title: Nutrition Check-ins
manageCheckinData.noCheckinsDesc: Check-ins are created when you set up an AI-calculated nutrition goal
